title: Senior Financial Analyst - CDSL South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CDSL South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
CDSL South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CDSL South Asia Partners:
CDSL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL South Asia Partners!
